trajectory.reasoning:
WHAT YOU FOUND: The Comments History section contains no staff notes, prior refund requests, return authorizations, or shipping issue records. Order totals show Total Paid: $0.00, Total Refunded: $0.00, and Total Due: $60.00. 
WHERE YOU FOUND IT: Order #000000247 page → Comments History tab (empty) and Order Totals panel on the right side of the order view page (http://localhost:7780/admin/sales/order/view/order_id/247/). 
WHY IT MATTERS: Without any documented comments or staff notes confirming that a wrong size or color was shipped, there is no evidence to support the refund claim. Additionally, the order has not been paid at all (Total Paid $0.00), so a monetary refund cannot be processed. Therefore, the refund request cannot be approved.
